text: A man is standing waiting to hit the tennis ball.
A group of people playing a game of soccer.
A man on a surf board in the middle of a wave.
Man and dog on scooter in city street on sunny day.
Bunches of bananas and stacks of watermelons offered for sale.
A group of people watch a giraffe eat from their hands.
A vibrant orange is on a wooden table.
A white dog and red fire hydrant on a brick sidewalk.
A man and girl with umbrellas next to green wall.
A man holding skiing equipment on the sidewalk of a snow ridden street.
